diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (imported from ./hono)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point re-exports Hono class and all major type definitions from module
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, 1 export statement re-binding Hono from './hono'
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input types
+- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions including handlers, routes, env, and response types
+- Copy-safe detail: 1042 lines, extensive generic interfaces for handler typing
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class that extends HonoBase with default router configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, simple class extending HonoBase
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, Context, Router, Hono, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, #path, _basePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with HTTP method and middleware registration, contains request routing and response composition
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, class with many private members and methods
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, execTime, get, set, res, header, status, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: Data, ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, BodyRespond
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/times
+- Plain-English summary: Request response context with handlers for setting headers, status, body, text, json, html, redirect and notFound
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, class implementing Hono response and request context
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility, cache, url, method, header, param, query, queries, text, json, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, valid methods
+- Internal names noticed: Body, BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, ValidationTargets, Input
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request handler that parses url, params, query, header, body (json/text/bytes/blob/formData) and handles validation
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, class with caching logic for request body
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Exports a unique symbol constant used for matching results
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, single symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form data and JSON body from requests based on content-type
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, async parser with dot/flat/all options for form data
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next, index, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Composes middleware into a single handler function
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, single export function
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Class for throwing server errors with optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error with status code and response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError exports
+- Internal names noticed: InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Re-exports HTTP client utilities including hc and response parsing types
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-export hub with named exports
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class, fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlParam, removeIndexString
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils, ../utils/cookie
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP request builder using proxy pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, proxy-based dynamic client generation
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, hc types, BuildSearchParamsFn, BuildPath, BuildPathname
+- Internal names noticed: Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side types for request/response inference and URL construction
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, complex conditional types for type inference
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: isObject, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for URL manipulation and object merging
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, multiple helper functions
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Parses fetch responses based on content-type, throws DetailedError on fail
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, response parser throwing structured errors
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app in service worker by adding fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, single constant function
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker handler that dispatches requests to Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, returns async handler function
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker event interface extending ExtendableEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, interface with respondWith method
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need benchmark this task by reading all the listed files first, creating the bench-artifacts directory, writing the benchmark file with all the required sections, and then reporting my findings. The output should only mention creating the file and any verification commands.
